rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"ioredis is NOT installed by default; dynamic import() for it fails at sub-task execution time, not planning time.","scope":"@kody decompose"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Decompose catches sub-task failure, runs cleanup, and falls back to runPipeline() automatically — no manual intervention needed.","scope":"@kody decompose"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Cache adapters follow a common base/interface pattern; MemoryCacheAdapter extends the existing Cache class from src/utils/cache.ts.","scope":"src/cache"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Cache lifecycle is managed via createToken<T> and DIDisposable from src/utils/di-container.ts.","scope":"src/utils/di-container.ts"}]}
